title: 5 things God builds in a man who keeps showing up
caption:
Nobody's watching.

But God is. And he's building something in you right now — not in spite of the ordinary days, but through them.

Most men are waiting for a sign, a calling, a better season. They miss that the work itself is the formation. The Tuesday morning. The task no one checked. The body you trained when the motivation ran out weeks ago.

There are five specific things God builds in a man who keeps showing up. They're not glamorous. They don't trend. But they're the difference between a man who looks the part and a man who actually holds.

—

Comment "work" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
